name: caveman-commit
tagline: Generates terse Conventional-Commits style commit messages from a diff; never runs git itself.
verdict: Well-scoped and safe: pure text generation, no shell execution, no file writes, clear rules and worked examples. Only gap is no versioning signal (no changelog/version field) — a minor packaging nit with no functional or security risk.

highlights.summary: No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
